playbook.intent: Across 4-6 weeks at year-end: close books, file taxes / VAT correctly across jurisdictions, refresh contracts + insurance, and publish a yearly retrospective that doubles as a marketing asset.
playbook.scope: Across 4-6 weeks at year-end: close books, file taxes / VAT correctly across jurisdictions, refresh contracts + insurance, and publish a yearly retrospective that doubles as a marketing asset.

success-criteria.criterion: Close books stage complete: Reconciled P&L
Taxes + VAT stage complete: Tax computation worksheet
Contracts + insurance stage complete: Updated MSAs
Year-in-review as marketing stage complete: Published retrospective post

stage.name: Close books
stage.intent: Reconcile every invoice + expense for the calendar year.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after books reconcile to the cent.

stage.name: Taxes + VAT
stage.intent: File correctly across every jurisdiction with no surprises.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after filings are submitted, not just drafted.

stage.name: Contracts + insurance
stage.intent: Refresh client contracts + liability/E&O insurance for the new year.

tasks.task: Audit each active contract for outdated terms
Send revised MSA to long-term clients

stage.decision-gate: Advance once all contracts are current. No expired terms carrying into new year.

stage.name: Year-in-review as marketing
stage.intent: Publish a transparent annual retrospective; turn close into a marketing asset.

tasks.task: Draft retrospective: revenue, lessons, projects shipped

stage.decision-gate: Required artifact: published post. Internal-only retros don't count.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content year-end-tax-legal-cashflow-close --format md, agent: faion get-content year-end-tax-legal-cashflow-close --format context, json: faion get-content year-end-tax-legal-cashflow-close --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, global angle'}]
